name: optimusprime
description: Session memory + guardrails for Claude Code. Remembers decisions across sessions, blocks repeated failures, compresses output, activates helper bots automatically. Type /optimusprime to start.

commands.name: op-watch
commands.description: Live status: tokens, cost, decisions, loop streak, compression %, active bots. Reads .optimusprime/ directly — no terminal needed.
commands.prompt: Show OptimusPrime status. Find .optimusprime/ by walking up from cwd (mkdir -p .optimusprime if missing). Read contract.json (goal), cost-log.json (last session tokens+cost), decisions.md (count DECIDED lines), loop-state.json (len consecutive_failures, ⚠️ at 3+), compression-log.json (avg ratio), skills.json (auto-mode bots). Show as one compact panel.

commands.name: op-autopilot
commands.description: Pre-session brief: what happened last session, what failed (never retry), open TODOs, recommended next step. Run before starting work.
commands.prompt: Show OptimusPrime session brief. Find .optimusprime/ by walking up from cwd (create if missing). Read session-snapshot.md (last state + NEXT line), contract.json (goal), attempts.md (failed approaches — list as DO-NOT-RETRY), todos.md. Show one compact brief ending with the recommended next action.

commands.name: op-decisions
commands.description: Last 10 logged decisions: what was chosen, what was rejected, why. Searchable — pass a keyword to filter.
commands.prompt: Show last 10 decisions from .optimusprime/decisions.md (walk up from cwd). Lines containing DECIDED or DECISION, newest last, with timestamps. If user gave a keyword, filter to matching lines. If empty: say decisions accrue automatically, offer to log one now.

commands.name: op-conductor
commands.description: Autonomous multi-step execution with guardrails: breaks your goal into subtasks, runs each, checks quality, escalates when stuck.
commands.prompt: Run Conductor. Ask for the goal if not given. Break into 3-5 subtasks with acceptance criteria, show plan, get approval. Execute each with Read/Edit/Write/Bash. After each: append '[ISO time] DECIDED: <what>' to .optimusprime/decisions.md. Stuck 5 times on one subtask → stop, report. Create .optimusprime/ + contract.json if missing.

commands.name: op-replay
commands.description: Replay a past session like a debugger: every decision, failure, and compression event in chronological order.
commands.prompt: Replay most recent session. From .optimusprime/ (walk up from cwd): merge decisions.md (DECIDED lines), attempts.md (failures), compression-log.json (events) by timestamp. Show chronological list + summary (n decisions, n failures, avg compression). No data → say history accrues as sessions run.
